zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Foljambe於大約1253年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾迪德斯維爾時，他的父親Thomas Foljambe20歲，母親Catherine Eyre17歲。他與Alice de Furnival結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1323年在他的家鄉享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Foljambe于大约1253年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾迪德斯維爾时，他的父亲Thomas Foljambe20岁，母亲Catherine Eyre17岁。他与Alice de Furnival结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1323年在他的家乡享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Foljambe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French fol ‘foolish, silly’ + jambe ‘leg’, probably a nickname for a lame person, someone with a maimed or crooked leg; compare Belgian . In Old French fol could be used of something useless or of little value, e.g. farine folle ‘mill dust’.

variants.name: Fulljames
meanings: English: variant of Foljambe with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belgian
meanings: Norman, English, Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French bele jambe ‘fine leg’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Foljambe was born about 1253, in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Foljambe, was 20 and his mother, Catherine Eyre, was 17. He married Alice de Furnival. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1323, in his hometown, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Foljambe est né environ 1253, à Tideswell, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Foljambe, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Catherine Eyre, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Furnival. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1323, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Foljambe um 1253 in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Foljambe 20 und seine Mutter Catherine Eyre 17. Er hat Alice de Furnival geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1323 im Alter von 72 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Foljambe è nato il circa 1253 nel Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Foljambe, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Eyre, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Furnival. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1323, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Foljambeが約1253年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアティデスウエルで生まれた時，父Thomas Foljambeは20歳，母Catherine Eyreは17歳であった。Alice de Furnivalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1323年に故郷で72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Foljambe(이)가 대략 1253년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 티데스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Foljambe(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Eyre(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Alice de Furnival(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1323년 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Foljambe nasceu aproximadamente 1253, em Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Foljambe, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Eyre, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Furnival. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1323, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Foljambe родился около 1253 г. в местности тидесвелл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Foljambe было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Eyre, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Furnival. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1323 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет.

Se casó con Alice de Furnival. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1323, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años.
